de'aaron fox.detail: Played 38 full minutes despite known ankle injury; struggled offensively going 0-4 from three
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox went 0-for-4 from three-point range on 3-13 shooting overall across 38 minutes. He has been battling a right ankle injury since the Western Conference Semifinals, which likely contributed to his offensive struggles and missed 3PM prop.

devin vassell.detail: Played 36 minutes, finished just under the points prop with 9 points
devin vassell.web_narrative: No injury or external factor identified; Vassell simply fell one point short of the over 10 points prop in a normal 36-minute outing.

jalen brunson.detail: Played 37 minutes, scored 30 points but recorded only 2 assists against a prop of over 6
jalen brunson.web_narrative: Brunson was in full scoring mode (30 points on 31 shots) but did not facilitate much, finishing with just 2 assists. No injury exit or minutes restriction occurred; the miss appears to be a function of his shot-heavy usage in Game 1.

mikal bridges.detail: Rolled his ankle early but played through it; finished with 9 points in 28 minutes
mikal bridges.web_narrative: Bridges rolled his ankle early in Game 1 but managed to play through the injury for the remainder of the game. The ankle issue may have limited his effectiveness, contributing to his 9-point output just under the over 10 prop.

og anunoby.detail: Played 31 minutes, finished with 3 rebounds against a prop of over 4
og anunoby.web_narrative: No mid-game injury exit or restriction flagged for Game 1; Anunoby simply finished one rebound short of the prop in 31 minutes of normal play.

stephon castle.detail: Castle went to the locker room after getting injured and had not yet returned per reports
stephon castle.web_narrative: Castle suffered an injury during the game after a play involving Victor Wembanyama and exited to the locker room, not returning. This likely limited his assist total, contributing to his 3-assist finish against an over 4 prop.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 38 full minutes; struggled shooting (6-21 FG, 2-9 3Pt) but posted a 26-point, 12-rebound line
